text:
After dark. That's all I know. My father drove.

It had been years. Those black nights.

There I was. Just ten. Mother passed away.

I guess I fell.

My knees bent inward.

You laugh?

I think my head busted wide open.

I woke because my arm wasn't numb.

I crawled.

I got tired.

Something ate me.

I hear that.

Something good.

They found me. That farmer.

I got food. But my leg.

They sewed.

I want bone.


I keep quiet.


They think.

You think?

Just trees.

They walk away.

I sit.

They find.

You find.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
